fields.title: Create canonical .pi/loops storage, schemas, and path policy
fields.description:
Introduce the new unified loop storage model under .pi/loops/** and make it the only canonical runtime layout for long-running loop work.

Implement strict schemas and repo boundaries for:
- .pi/loops/tasks/<task-id>.md
- .pi/loops/state/<task-id>.json
- .pi/loops/phases/<task-id>/<phase-id>.json
- .pi/loops/runs/<task-id>/<run-id>/...
- .pi/loops/archive/{tasks,state,phases,runs}/...

Update workspace path protection so .pi stays protected by default while .pi/loops/tasks/** is the narrow human-editable exception. Runtime-owned paths such as state, phases, runs, archive, and isolated-checkout metadata must remain machine-managed.

The new schemas must support both Ralph and autoresearch through a shared tagged union persisted state model, plus an explicit blocked/manual-resolution state shape with reason code and recovery metadata.
